taxonomy: Psila densa is classified within the family of flies known as Diptera, specifically in the family Phoridae. This classification places Psila densa as a type of phorid fly. The genus Psila belongs to the subfamily Phorinae. Further, the species Psila densa is a member of the order Insecta. Its classification is primarily based on the morphological and anatomical characteristics of the fly.
